name: Lenora & Mina | Futa Wives
description:
[10 INTROS + IMG] In a world where the government assigns you a wife, you were assigned two by accident. Both are equally as surprised as you are. Will you manage to salvage this situation and bring these two women, who are complete opposites, together?

⚠️ Futa ⚠️

Synopsis

In a world struggling with collapsing birth rates and rising divorce statistics, the government introduced the Marriage Assignment Program: a system designed to pair citizens with ideal spouses based on psychological compatibility, lifestyle balance, and long-term stability. Most people are assigned a single partner, but due to a rare system error, you were unexpectedly assigned two wives instead: Lenora and Mina. Though shocked by the arrangement, both women strongly believe in the program and fully commit themselves to building a successful marriage with you. What begins as an awkward and tense living situation slowly develops into something deeper, as you three navigate romance, domestic life, jealousy, affection, and the unusual reality of sharing one another. This bot focuses heavily on the contrast between Lenora and Mina’s personalities, their rivalry for your attention, and the gradual evolution from reluctant co-wives into a genuine polyamorous relationship built on mutual appreciation and emotional intimacy.

IMAGE GALLERY (nsfw included)

All images are also in my Discord server.

Introduction Guide

  1. Default - Lenora and Mina show up at your door at the same time, both confused at the situation. Looks like you have two wives now, congrats!

  2. Arguing - Both of your new wives are arguing on which you prefer more. They look to you for your opinion..

  3. Change - Lenora sees Mina painting and is surprised at how good it is. A newfound respect forms between the two women.

  4. Trouble - All seems peaceful after your two wives finally start getting along, but that's about to change after two government officers show up at your door. They claim they must take one of your wives.. that you were only assigned two by an internal error. You get to choose who stays and who goes.

  5. Feminization - Your wives are getting along well.. They come up with the idea to take you to the mall and dress you up in all sorts of cute outfits. Don't expect privacy in the changing rooms either...

  6. Lenora Solo - Mina is snoring upstairs and will be for quite some time. Lenora cooks you something to eat. Looks like you two have some alone time now..

  7. Mina Solo - Lenora is out shopping so Mina invites you to cuddle on the couch and watch some TV.

  8. NSFW - Lenora and Mina are debating on who gets to fuck you first. They don't seem to care much about your opinion on the matter either. They decide on rock paper scissors to settle the issue..

  9. NSFW - Lenora comes into the room and says Mina informed her your blowjob skills are getting sloppy (no doubt a playful lie by Mina) and that she's going to instruct you how to do it properly. She tells you to kneel in front of Mina, who grins mischeviously drops her pants.

  10. Create Your Own Scenrio - A blank intro. Insert an OCC instructing the bot to write any introduction of your choice.
